occurrence_sentence: An Axios source said legislation will be unveiled that will accelerate quantum technology adoption in the US Department of Defense.

interaction_phrase: is preparing to unveil the Defense Quantum Acceleration Act
occurrence_sentence: According to the source, Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-New York) is preparing to unveil the Defense Quantum Acceleration Act.
Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-New York) is preparing to unveil the Defense Quantum Acceleration Act, Axios is reporting.

According to the media site, an industry source said that, under the proposed legislation, the Department of Defense would develop and execute a comprehensive strategy for integrating quantum information science technology across its operations.

Rep. Elise Stefanik (R-New York) is preparing to unveil the Defense Quantum Acceleration Act, [Axios](https://www.axios.com/pro/tech-policy/2024/03/21/bills-of-the-week-quantum-ai-and-more) is reporting.
